requirements.description: Dispatcher discovers available actions, describes them, and validates arguments.
Dispatcher dry-run mode prints descriptions and warns on unknown arguments without executing actions.
Actions correctly resolve and pass RelativePath arguments without warnings.
Every action script exists at the expected path.
Dispatcher fails when RelativePath is missing or invalid.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in apply-vipc/action.yml on a self-hosted Windows runner labeled self-hosted-windows-lv with dry_run true.
Workflow tests the composite action defined in apply-vipc/action.yml on a self-hosted Windows runner labeled self-hosted-windows-lv with dry_run false.
